description: Log into the Sentrifugo HRMS using the employee credentials provided in ~/Desktop/urgent_profile_update.txt. Update the employee's profile by setting their address, adding an emergency contact, adding a dependent, and uploading the provided profile picture (~/Desktop/david_profile_pic.jpg). Ensure all information matches the text file exactly. Note: some changes may require HR approval and will be marked as 'Pending' in the UI.
